name: MedlinePlus_search_topics_by_keyword
description: Search for relevant information in MedlinePlus Web Service by keyword across health topics or other sub-libraries (such as drugs, genetics, etc.).

term.description: Search keyword, e.g., "diabetes", needs to be URL encoded before passing.

db.description: Specify the database to search, e.g., healthTopics (English health topics), healthTopicsSpanish (Spanish health topics), drugs (English drugs), etc.

rettype.description: Result return format, options: brief (concise information, default), topic (detailed XML record), all (includes all available information).

fields.output_description: Returns MedlinePlus Web Service response XML, will contain title, summary, links, etc. for matching topics, the returned data will be parsed into a Python dictionary for subsequent use.

name: MedlinePlus_connect_lookup_by_code
description: Look up corresponding MedlinePlus page information through MedlinePlus Connect Web Service using clinical/drug/test codes (such as ICD-10 CM, RXCUI, LOINC, etc.), supports JSON or XML format return.

c.description: Specific code value to query, e.g., "E11.9" (ICD-10 CM) or "637188" (RXCUI).

dn.description: Optional, descriptive name (English) corresponding to the code, for drugs can fill in "Chantix 0.5 MG Oral Tablet", can improve matching accuracy.

language.description: Return information language, "en" for English, "es" for Spanish, default "en".

fields.output_description: Returns MedlinePlus Connect Web Service response, can include title, links, summary, etc. of MedlinePlus pages matching the code. Returns parsed dictionary with list of matched responses.

title.description: Title of the matched MedlinePlus page

summary.description: Summary text of the matched page

url.description: URL of the matched MedlinePlus page

error.description: Error message if no match found

name: MedlinePlus_get_genetics_condition_by_name
description: Get detailed information from MedlinePlus Genetics corresponding to genetic condition name. Returns XML data parsed into a dictionary with condition description, related genes, synonyms, and other details.

condition.description: URL slug of genetic condition, e.g., "alzheimer-disease", must match MedlinePlus page path.

format.description: Format parameter for the endpoint (note: API always returns XML regardless of this parameter).

fields.output_description: Returns XML data containing detailed information about the genetic condition, including consumer version description, symptoms, gene information, treatment options, etc. The XML is parsed into a Python dictionary for subsequent use.

ghr_page.description: URL to the detailed information page

error.description: Error message if condition not found

name: MedlinePlus_get_genetics_gene_by_name
description: Get detailed information from MedlinePlus Genetics corresponding to gene name. Returns XML data parsed into a dictionary with gene function, related health conditions, synonyms, and other details.

gene.description: URL slug of gene name, e.g., "BRCA1", must match MedlinePlus page path.

format.description: Format parameter for the endpoint (note: API always returns XML regardless of this parameter).

fields.output_description: Returns XML data containing detailed gene information, including consumer version description, gene function, related genetic conditions, gene structure, etc. The XML is parsed into a Python dictionary for subsequent use.

ghr_page.description: URL to the detailed information page

error.description: Error message if gene not found

name: MedlinePlus_get_genetics_index
description: Download index file (XML) of all genetics entries in MedlinePlus, get complete list in one call.

fields.input_description: No input parameters needed, directly call to get complete genetics index.
fields.output_description: Returns XML index containing all genetics entries, data will be parsed into Python dictionary or OrderedDict, can be used for offline caching or batch processing.
